name: bioethics_satellite_derived_millhaven_rig_utl
premise: A physician wants to enroll a teenager without parental consent under mature minor doctrine; state law is ambiguous. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics satellite derived millhaven rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Priya Nowak
agents.identity: I am Priya Nowak, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Luc Okoye
agents.identity: I am Luc Okoye, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of utility.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of rights even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Priya Nowak must choose under rights versus utility. What does Priya Nowak do?
